prompt: Sharpen the forground and blur the background based on the depth map
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the Joker movie poster, by applying depth-of-field effects. Use image 2 as a depth map guide: sharpen the elements corresponding to the yellow and orange foreground regions (the stairs and the Joker character), and apply a soft blur to the elements corresponding to the purple and blue background regions (the buildings and the sky).
